title: THETA Control Room — Build Hook Delta

changedProjects.lastKnownStatus: Build hook reported latest project state.
changedProjects.nextAction: v0.4.40 — PRESET LOUDNESS MATCHING + HEADLESS RENDER RIG (user: 'each preset is a different output level'; chose bake-trims / unity-vs-bypass / headless rig via interactive Qs; also DECIDED: all 3 IRON voices permanent). NEW: creosote_probe (Tests/render_probe.cpp + CMake console target) — loads the REAL CreosoteProcessor + PresetManager, renders deterministic pink noise at -18dBFS RMS (4s warmup discarded for PDC/envelopes, 8s measured), reports per-preset RMS delta vs bypass. MEASURED BEFORE: presets spanned -3.8dB (PHOENIX) to +7.9dB (JUNGLE_IS_MASV) vs bypass — an 11.7dB spread; NEAL_DEF read exactly 0.00 (clean chain = unity, rig validated). FIX: iterated LIM_LEVEL trims per preset (36dB/unit) to unity; limiter-pinned presets converge slowly (output RMS is ceiling-determined while deep in GR — SLAMMM needed 3 rounds, JUNGLE floored LIM_LEVEL at -18dB and took its last 1.4dB from CMP_MAKEUP, which was +19.8dB!). FINAL: all 23 presets within +/-0.3dB of unity. NOTE: SLAMMM/JUNGLE hit their limiters less hard now (level-matching necessarily reduced limiter drive) — if their slam character wants restoring, lower their LIM_LIMIT ceilings instead of raising level. Preset value changes only, no DSP: no version bumps (per contract). The probe stays as the permanent phase2 audio harness (cmake --build build --target creosote_probe). VERIFY IN ABLETON: preset browsing at constant monitor level — every preset should now sit at the same loudness as bypass; A/B toggling never fools you with level. OPEN: painted-metal chassis; deferred patina; LIMITER rename.
